summary: Completed testing of Iteration 20 - Storefront Checkout Features. Backend: 11/12 tests passed (1 skipped due to Razorpay live key auth issue). Frontend: Checkout page, form validation, payment method selection, and order confirmation page all working correctly. One bug found: redirect to order confirmation fails due to cart empty check.

minor.issue: Razorpay live keys returning 'Authentication failed' error - may need key verification or test mode keys

ui_bugs.issue: After successful COD order placement, redirect to order confirmation page fails. The useEffect that checks for empty cart (line 281-286) triggers before navigate() completes, redirecting user to /shop/cart instead of /shop/order-confirmation/{orderId}
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Add a state flag like 'orderPlaced' to prevent cart empty redirect after successful order, or use a ref to track navigation intent

action_items: FIX (HIGH): Checkout.jsx - Prevent cart empty redirect after successful order placement. The clearCart() call triggers useEffect redirect before navigate() to order confirmation can complete
INVESTIGATE (MEDIUM): Razorpay live keys authentication failing - verify keys are correct and have proper permissions
critical_code_review_comments: Checkout.jsx line 281-286: useEffect with cart.length === 0 check causes race condition with order placement navigation
Order creation API working correctly - orders are saved to MongoDB and synced to Shopify
Order confirmation page renders correctly when accessed directly with valid order ID
Form validation working correctly with 8 required field validations

success_rate.frontend: 90% (All features work except redirect after order placement)

seed_data_creation: Created multiple test orders via API and UI testing. Sample order IDs: SF26010618012823, SF26010618015751
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 checkout features tested. Backend APIs all working (COD order creation, order retrieval, Razorpay order creation endpoint exists but auth fails with live keys). Frontend checkout flow works but has a bug: after successful order placement, user is redirected to cart instead of order confirmation page due to useEffect race condition. Order confirmation page works correctly when accessed directly. Sample product ID: 8568346706086, Sample order ID: SF26010618012823

backend_apis.GET /api/storefront/health: PASS - Returns status ok, razorpay_configured true
backend_apis.POST /api/storefront/orders (COD): PASS - Creates order successfully, syncs to Shopify
backend_apis.POST /api/storefront/create-razorpay-ord: SKIPPED - Razorpay auth failing with live keys

frontend_ui.payment_method_selection: PASS - Both Razorpay and COD options available
frontend_ui.cod_order_placement: PARTIAL - Order created but redirect fails
frontend_ui.order_confirmation_page: PASS - Renders correctly with order details

bug_details.title: Checkout redirect to order confirmation fails after COD order
steps_to_reproduce: 6. Order is created (toast shows 'Order placed successfully!')
7. User is redirected to /shop/cart instead of /shop/order-confirmation/{orderId}
bug_details.root_cause: useEffect in Checkout.jsx (line 281-286) checks if cart.length === 0 and redirects to /shop/cart. When clearCart() is called after successful order, this useEffect triggers before navigate() to order confirmation can complete.
bug_details.suggested_fix: Add a state flag or ref to track successful order placement and skip the cart empty redirect in that case
